articles.title: Kariobangi North Residents Raise Concern Over Rising Insecurity
articles.content:
Residents of Kariobangi North have raised concern over a recent rise in insecurity, citing an increase in muggings and theft cases across the estate. Many say they no longer feel safe, especially during the early morning and late evening hours.
The growing security concerns have also affected local businesses, with some traders reporting fewer customers as people avoid staying out late.
Residents are now calling on security agencies to intensify police patrols and enhance community policing to curb crime. They also urge members of the public to remain vigilant and report any suspicious activities to the relevant authorities.
The community hopes that swift action will help restore safety and confidence within the neighborhood.
